creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
Today, june 28 2020, I retrieved the official packages built by the FreeBSD cluster, from http://pkg.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:12:amd64/latest/All/qt5-qmake-5.14.2.txz, and obtain

```
[adridg@beastie /tmp]$ tar tvzf qt5-qmake-5.14.2.txz | grep linux.conf
-rw-r--r--  0 root   wheel     1369 Mar 27 10:49 /usr/local/lib/qt5/mkspecs/common/linux.conf
```
